summary: Frontend verification of PACKAGING LOSS addition to Branch Comparison Dashboard (لوحة مقارنة الفروع). All required data-testids render with correct seeded values (3,750 IQD). Tab switching, summary card, per-row detail line, dedicated ranking section, and date-range re-fetch all work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: BranchComparisonReport.js (~260 lines) is clean, well-structured, properly uses defaults (packaging_ranking:[]) so no runtime crash when backend returns empty.
Single useEffect on [startDate,endDate] correctly re-triggers fetchData on range button or manual date change (confirmed via captured XHRs).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded packaging loss for branch 'الفرع الرئيسي' (id=76f56acc-...) — packaging_loss=3,750 IQD, business_date 2026-06-01.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Comparison Dashboard packaging feature fully verified. tab-comparison switches correctly, /api/reports/branch-comparison returns packaging_ranking + summary.total_packaging_loss=3750, all new testids render: comp-total-packaging-loss=3,750 IQD, packaging-comparison-section, packaging-comp-row-76f56acc-..., packaging-comp-value-76f56acc-...=3,750 IQD, per-row 'فقد تغليف: 3,750 IQD' line on الفرع الرئيسي. Both 'هذا الشهر' (default) and '3 أشهر' ranges show the packaging row. No issues found.
